fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Massachusetts SLP License Requirements — Fees, Board Contact & How to Apply (2026)
seo.description: Complete guide to Massachusetts speech-language pathologist licensing. Board of Registration fees, Praxis requirements, and telepractice rules for 2026.
seo.keywords: Massachusetts SLP license, speech-language pathologist Massachusetts, MA speech therapy license

board.name: Board of Registration of Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: The full credential to independently practice speech-language pathology in Massachusetts.

license_types.title: Temporary SLP License
license_types.description: Issued to SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Earn a Master's Degree in SLP
steps.description: Complete a master's degree from a CAA-accredited program.

steps.title: Pass the Praxis Examination
steps.description: Achieve a passing score on Praxis (test code 5331, score 162).

steps.title: Complete Clinical Fellowship
steps.description: Complete 36 weeks of supervised clinical practice (1,260 hours).

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.description: Submit application with fees to the Board of Registration.

documents.detail: Massachusetts Criminal Offender Record Information check.

telepractice_text: Massachusetts permits telepractice for licensed SLPs. Massachusetts is not currently a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact. A valid Massachusetts SLP license is required.
provisional_text: Massachusetts issues a Temporary SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Massachusetts does not participate in the ASLP Interstate Compact. Out-of-state SLPs must apply for full Massachusetts licensure.

faqs.question: How much does a Massachusetts SLP license cost?
Is Massachusetts part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
faqs.answer: No. Massachusetts has not enacted ASLP-IC legislation as of 2026.

faqs.question: Does Massachusetts allow telepractice for SLPs?
faqs.answer: Yes, with a valid Massachusetts license.
